name: Ghosty
styleLock: Ghosty the cat must appear in every panel: a fat, chunky black cat with thick sleek black fur, large expressive bright green eyes, a small dark nose, and a thick tail. Art style: minimalist ligne claire European comic style, clean uniform thin black ink outlines, flat colors overlaid with visible vintage comic halftone dot shading texture. Global constraints: pure white background only, isolated character, no scenery, no background elements, props minimal, absolutely no text anywhere, no speech bubbles, no captions, no signs, no numbers, no sound effects, blank screens.
